sanskrit:
बन्धुरात्मात्मनस्तस्य येनात्मैवात्मना जितः।
अनात्मनस्तु शत्रुत्वे वर्तेतात्मैव शत्रुवत्॥
transliteration: bandhur ātmātmanas tasya yenātmaivātmanā jitaḥ | anātmanas tu śatrutve vartetātmaiva śatru-vat ||
literal_meaning: The mind is a friend to the one by whom the mind has been conquered by the self; but for one who has not conquered it, the very mind will remain as an enemy like a foe.
contextual_meaning: Self-regulation turns the mind into an ally; lack of it turns the same mind into an inner saboteur.
psychological_state: Recognition that the untrained mind can hijack goals and identity.
trigger_scenario: Scrolling social media for ‘five minutes’ and emerging two hours later, drained and self-critical.
anchor_text: Master your mind or it masters you.
